title: Pecan-Crusted Chicken with Honey Mustard & Apple Salad
description: Home Chef and HelloFresh fan favorite — chicken breasts coated in a crunchy toasted pecan and panko crust, served with a tangy honey mustard sauce and a crisp lemony apple and arugula salad. Elegant and delicious.
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Line a baking sheet with foil and spray with cooking spray.
Mix chopped pecans and panko in a shallow bowl. In another bowl, mix 2 tbsp Dijon mustard with 1 tbsp olive oil.
Pound chicken breasts to ¾-inch thickness. Brush each breast with the mustard-oil mixture. Press firmly into the pecan-panko mixture to coat both sides.
Place on the prepared baking sheet. Drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil. Bake 18–22 minutes until golden and cooked through (165°F).
Make honey mustard sauce: whisk together honey, remaining 1 tbsp Dijon, mayonnaise, and a squeeze of lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper.
Make the apple salad: thinly slice apples. Toss arugula and apple slices with apple cider vinegar, remaining 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Serve pecan-crusted chicken with honey mustard sauce drizzled over the top and the apple arugula salad alongside.
tips: Chop the pecans finely so they adhere well to the chicken — large pieces tend to fall off.
Toast the pecans in a dry skillet for 3 minutes before using for even more flavor.
The honey mustard sauce doubles as a great salad dressing — make extra.
Swap arugula for spinach or mixed greens if you prefer a milder salad.
